prestazioni: Engine swap to a Rover 3.9L V8 (engine code: 3948cc, 14CU) with a custom billet aluminum crankshaft from JE Pistons, forged Mahle pistons (9.5:1 compression), and Carrillo H-beam connecting rods for high-RPM durability. Pair with a custom-fabricated stainless steel exhaust manifold by Hayward & Scott, feeding into a Borla Pro XS 2.5" cat-back system with 304 stainless steel tubing and straight-through mufflers for optimal scavenging.

Installation of a custom-engineered turbocharging system using a Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger (0.63 A/R turbine housing) with a custom intercooler setup by Bell Auto Services, featuring a front-mount air-to-water intercooler core with a Davies Craig EWP150 electric water pump and a custom aluminum radiator. Boost controlled via a Turbosmart CompGate40 wastegate and a Haltech Elite 2500 standalone ECU for precise fuel and ignition mapping.

Upgraded drivetrain with a Rover LT77 5-speed manual transmission reinforced with a Quaife ATB differential (80% lockup) and a custom dual-plate clutch from Tilton Engineering (7.25" diameter, 6 puck sintered metallic). Transfer case upgraded to a Rover LT230 with a 2.7:1 low-range gear set and a custom aluminum tail housing from RPI Engineering for weight reduction.
estetica: Custom widebody conversion using aluminum overland fenders from Richards Chassis, extending wheel arches by 3" to accommodate 16x9" steel wheels from Hutchinson Industries (ET15 offset) wrapped in BF Goodrich KM3 265/75R16 tires. Fender flares finished in raw aluminum with a brushed satin clear coat for a rugged, utilitarian look.

Front bumper replacement with a custom steel bumper from Safety Devices, featuring integrated D-ring mounts, a winch plate for a Warn Zeon 10-S Platinum, and a recessed LED light bar from Rigid Industries (E-Series Pro 50"). Rear bumper upgraded to a matching steel bumper with a swing-out tire carrier and jerry can mounts from ARB.

Interior stripped and rebuilt with a full custom roll cage by Custom Cages (8-point, TIG-welded 4130 chromoly), Recaro SRD bucket seats with Schroth 6-point harnesses, and a custom aluminum dashboard from Rally Design featuring a Stack Instruments analog gauge cluster (oil pressure, boost, water temp) and a Racepak IQ3 data logger.
